pat-2026-03-22-001.name: TDD Implementation Pattern
pat-2026-03-22-001.pattern: Tests must be written before implementation code
pat-2026-03-22-001.problem: Writing implementation first leads to poor test coverage and unclear requirements

quality_rules: All edge cases must be covered
Tests must be independent and repeatable

pat-2026-03-22-002.name: Spec-First Development
pat-2026-03-22-002.pattern: Create specification documents before any implementation
pat-2026-03-22-002.problem: Starting implementation without specs leads to misaligned expectations and rework

steps: If missing, create spec with API contract, UI requirements, test cases
Get spec approval before delegating to agents
quality_rules: Spec must include API endpoints and request/response format
Spec must include UI layout and interaction requirements
Spec must include test cases for all scenarios

pat-2026-03-22-003.name: WCAG AA Accessibility Standard
pat-2026-03-22-003.pattern: All UI components must meet WCAG AA accessibility standards
pat-2026-03-22-003.problem: Ignoring accessibility excludes users and creates technical debt
